moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 concludes
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 19th, with a thrilling final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, crowning a new world champion.

angles.name: Final Recap
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup final? The biggest tournament in football wrapped up on Sunday night with an incredible showpiece event. What a tournament!

angles.name: Tournament Wrap
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is over! From stunning upsets to incredible goals, what was your favourite moment from this year's tournament across the US, Canada and Mexico?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 crowns new champions
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded on Sunday, July 12th, with new champions crowned in both the Men's and Women's Singles events.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: Wimbledon 2026 is done and dusted! New champions have been crowned on Centre Court. Who impressed you most at this year's tournament?

angles.name: Best of Wimbledon
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream, epic rallies, and new champions! Wimbledon 2026 delivered. What was your favourite moment from the last two weeks?

moments.title: The Open Championship concludes at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, concluded on Sunday, July 19th, with a new Champion Golfer of the Year lifting the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Golf Major Wrap
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has been lifted! The Open Championship wrapped up at Royal Birkdale on Sunday, delivering another fantastic major. Did you catch the action?

angles.name: Birkdale Review
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale once again proved a magnificent, challenging host for The Open. What a setting for a major championship!

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show kicks off today
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, Wales's largest agricultural event and celebration of rural life, opens its gates today in Llanelwedd, Builth Wells, running until Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Show Opening
angles.copy: It's here! The Royal Welsh Show 2026 officially opens its doors today! Who's heading to Llanelwedd for a fantastic day out?

angles.name: What's On
angles.copy: From livestock competitions to food halls and crafts, the Royal Welsh Show is packed with things to see and do all week. What are you most looking forward to?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show brings thousands to Mid Wales this week! Expect a great atmosphere and a true celebration of Welsh rural life.

moments.title: Love Island UK continues to heat up
moments.blurb: ITV2's hit reality show Love Island UK is in full swing, with new arrivals, recouplings, and drama keeping viewers gripped as the final approaches.

angles.name: Daily Dose
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's your favourite couple right now, and who do you think is on thin ice?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: With the Love Island final getting closer, the pressure is on! What's been the most shocking moment of the series so far?

moments.title: New UK Official Singles Chart this Friday
moments.blurb: The new Official Singles Chart Top 40 will be announced this Friday, July 24th, with speculation mounting over who will claim the coveted number one spot.

angles.name: Chart Prediction
angles.copy: Who's going to be the new UK Number 1 this Friday? Is there a new banger about to take the top spot, or will a current favourite hold on?

angles.name: Weekend Listen
angles.copy: Get ready for new music! The Official Singles Chart gets a refresh this Friday – perfect for your weekend playlist. What tracks are you hoping to see climb?

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) is 78 today
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday today, July 21st.

angles.name: Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Cat Stevens, aka Yusuf Islam! What's your favourite track from the folk-rock icon?

angles.name: Music Memories
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World', Cat Stevens has given us so many timeless songs. Celebrating his 78th birthday today!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79 tomorrow
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and successful solo artist, will celebrate his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of Eagles legend Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', his voice is iconic.

angles.name: Solo Hits
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Don Henley a happy 79th birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite solo hit from the Eagles frontman?

moments.title: Selena Gomez is 34 tomorrow
moments.blurb: Actress and pop superstar Selena Gomez will turn 34 tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Selena Gomez turns 34! From Disney star to pop sensation, she's had an incredible career. What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 34th birthday to Selena Gomez tomorrow! Let's celebrate with some of her biggest hits.

moments.title: Guns N' Roses' Slash turns 61 on Thursday
moments.blurb: Legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Get ready to salute a guitar icon! Slash turns 61 on Thursday. What's your favourite GNR riff or solo from the man in the top hat?

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: He's the riff master! Wishing a very happy 61st birthday to the one and only Slash this Thursday. What's your ultimate Guns N' Roses anthem?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez celebrates 57th birthday Friday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez will celebrate her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo Day
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Jenny from the Block! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Friday. What's your favourite J.Lo dance track?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: Still got it! Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday. An incredible career spanning music, film, and fashion.

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Still rolling! The incomparable Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday.

moments.title: Kate Bush is 68 next Thursday
moments.blurb: Iconic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush will celebrate her 68th birthday next Thursday, July 30th.

angles.name: Music Genius
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the 68th birthday of the incredible Kate Bush! A true visionary in music. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Wuthering Heights
angles.copy: From 'Wuthering Heights' to 'Running Up That Hill', Kate Bush's impact is undeniable. Wishing her a very happy 68th birthday next Thursday!
